zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空延续
zh.content:
XRP/USD短线维持弱势震荡，价格持续运行在1.03下方并低于20日均线，整体趋势偏空，中期上行动能不足，反弹多次受压。

MACD为负值且位于零轴下方，空头动能占优。价格低于SMA20(1.035)，均线压制明显，RSI缺失但结构显示弱势回调延续。

支撑阻力方面：下方支撑1.0205及1.0200整数关口，跌破或指向1.01区域。上方阻力1.0275与1.0352，突破需成交量配合。

交易策略上建议以反弹做空为主，若价格反抽至1.0270-1.0350区间承压可分批布局空单；若跌破1.0205则顺势追空，严格设置止损在1.036上方。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is in short-term consolidation with a mild bearish bias after drifting toward the 1.02 region. Price remains compressed near intraday lows, indicating fading bullish momentum and lower volatility. Trading below the 20-period SMA at 1.0352 confirms loss of short-term trend strength. Overall structure is neutral-to-bearish, with sellers gradually gaining control unless price reclaims key resistance levels soon in the near term.

MACD is currently negative at -0.0077, signaling weakening momentum and continued bearish pressure in the short term. The absence of a visible RSI reading limits overbought/oversold confirmation but price behavior suggests subdued demand. With price trading below the 20-SMA, momentum alignment remains skewed to the downside. Any upward moves are likely corrective unless MACD histogram improves and price reclaims moving average resistance.

Immediate support is concentrated around 1.0205, with a break below exposing the psychological 1.00 level as the next major downside target. On the upside resistance is first seen at the 20-period SMA near 1.0352, followed by stronger supply between 1.045 and 1.050. Price is currently trapped in a tight range, suggesting a potential breakout setup rather than sustained trend continuation.

Trading strategy favors range-bound approaches in the current environment, with short positions considered near resistance and protective stops above 1.0352. Long positions are only more attractive on a confirmed breakout above the SMA, targeting 1.045–1.05. Until momentum improves, caution is warranted as price action remains compressed and sensitive to sudden volatility spikes. Risk management is essential given low volatility compression.
